name: Kamemon

signature_move.name: Pointer Arrow
signature_move.description: Launches an arrow-shaped guided missile from a hatch on its backthat it is able to guide until it hits the opponent.

description: A Cyborg Digimon with a shell resembling a mouse . Its Special Moves are an arrow-shaped missile that it is able to guide itself until it hits the opponent ( Pointer Arrow ), and rolling the ball in its abdomen to charge forward, and then attacking with the helmet on its head ( 'met Tackle ). It also has the ability " Koura Guard ", which allows it to retract its whole body into its shell and reflect the opponent's attacks entirely. Incidentally, its helmet cannot fit into its shell.
